Converts a script file into a C header file with escaped characters and line wrapping.

# Purpose
This script is a Bash executable that processes a given input file and generates a C header file. It defines a macro named `JERRY_MCU_SCRIPT` in the output file specified by the second argument. The script reads the input file specified by the first argument, escapes all double-quote characters, and wraps each line in double quotes, appending a backslash at the end of each line. This transformation is useful for embedding script content into C source code as a string literal.
